ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ring_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ring size */,
  "size_inches" TEXT /* Size of the ring in inches */,
  "size_mm" REAL /* Size of the ring in millimeters */,
  "diameter_mm" REAL /* Diameter of the ring in millimeters */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* User-friendly name for the ring size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the ring size */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the ring size record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country (e.g., USA, EUR) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the country */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Primary language code used in the country */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the country record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring size being converted */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which the conversion is being made */,
  "conversion_size" TEXT /* Converted size in the local country */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., ring, bracelet) */,
  "conversion_method" TEXT /* Method used for conversion (e.g., standard, custom) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the conversion record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring size ordered */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which the order was made */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit_card, paypal) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the order record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_orders_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
